_notes: Source: iit-proj-observation (clinical research). Target: R4 base observation (unconstrained). Source has mandatory study extensions, extensive slicing on category/code, banned performer, and constrained types. Target is the unconstrained R4 base: all research constraints removed, slicing removed, bans lifted.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-obs-1 (error: LOINC code required), iit-obs-2 (error: Final observations must have value or dataAbsentReason), iit-obs-3 (warning: Quantitative results should include units)]. R4 base has no custom differential constraints (obs-6 and obs-7 are base constraints inherited by both).
Mandatory extension studyTimepoint[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (R4 base has no extension constraints).
Optional extension dataQualityFlag[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension queryStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Source extension slicing removed in target: source defines slices [studyTimepoint, dataQualityFlag, queryStatus]; R4 base has no extension slicing.
identifier cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased.
identifier.system cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base).
identifier.value cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base).

status binding version pin added in target: source required:http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-status (no version) → target required:http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-status|4.0.1. Same value set with version pin added.
status MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; target mustSupport=false. Both min=1 (mandatory element).
category cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false preferred:observation-category] (R4 base). Min decreased.

category slicing removed: source has slices [laboratory[0..1 mustSupport=true], vitalSigns[0..1 mustSupport=true], studyEndpoint[0..1 mustSupport=true]] with discriminator=pattern $this; R4 base has no category slicing.
Source category slice laboratory[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target.
Source category slice vitalSigns[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target.
Source category slice studyEndpoint[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target.
code.coding cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true sliced] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base has no code.coding constraint in differential).
code.coding slicing removed: source has loinc slice [coding:loinc[1..1 mustSupport=true patternCoding(system=http://loinc.org)]] with discriminator=pattern $this; R4 base has no code.coding slicing.
Source mandatory slice code.coding:loinc[1..1 mustSupport=true patternCoding(system=http://loinc.org)] removed in target. LOINC requirement enforced by source is entirely absent from R4 base.
code MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; target mustSupport=false). Both have min=1 (required element).
subject cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased.
Reference target changed: source constrains to iit-proj/Patient; R4 base target is [Patient, Group, Device, Location]. Target types widened to generic R4 base targets.
encounter MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
encounter reference target removed: source constrains to iit-proj/Encounter; R4 base has no target profile constraint on encounter.
effective[x] cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased.
effective[x] types widened: source [dateTime, Period] (2 types) → target [dateTime, Period, Timing, instant] (4 types). Two additional types available in R4 base.
performer ban lifted: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Max relaxed from 0 to *; ban removed.

value[x] types widened: source [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, integer, boolean] (5 types) → target [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean, integer, Range, Ratio, SampledData, time, dateTime, Period] (11 types). Six additional types available in R4 base.
value[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
dataAbsentReason MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true extensible:data-absent-reason; target mustSupport=false, same extensible:data-absent-reason binding).
interpretation MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true extensible:observation-interpretation; target mustSupport=false, same binding).
note MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
referenceRange MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
referenceRange.low MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
referenceRange.high MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
component MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
component.code MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false). Both have min=1 (required element).

component.value[x] types widened: source [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string] (3 types) → target [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean, integer, Range, Ratio, SampledData, time, dateTime, Period] (11 types). Eight additional types available in R4 base.
component.value[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
